titles.title: Are You Travelling On the Right Road

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Are you travelling on the right road? Are you travelling on the right road? Are you travelling on the right road? You should be travelling on the right road.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: You were born to be leader You believe Him all the way Never think that you’ll be forsaken For you’ll be travelling on the right road.
